items.headline: 4 takeaways: Young San Antonio team earns its playoff spurs with series victory
items.description: The Spurs put their offensive versatility on display in Game 5 to oust the Blazers and punch their ticket to the semifinals.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Jalen Brunson stars, Hawks struggle shooting from 3
items.description: New York turns in its most dominant performance, a 126-97 victory for a 3-2 lead in a series it trailed just 4 days earlier.

items.headline: Top basketball recruit Tyran Stokes commits to Kansas over Kentucky
items.description: Seattle prep forward Tyran Stokes, the consensus No. 1 men’s basketball recruit for next season, announced his commitment to Kansas on Tuesday

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Joel Embiid endures, Tyrese Maxey helps 76ers live another game
items.description: Philly leans on Joel Embiid and a dominant if not desperate 4th quarter to keep their season alive with a big Game 5 win.

items.headline: Lakers' Austin Reaves hopes to return for pivotal Game 5 vs. Rockets
items.description: Reaves expressed cautious optimism Tuesday when he spoke to reporters for the first time since getting hurt April 2.

items.headline: Recap: Spurs advance, 76ers, Knicks win
items.description: Enjoy 2026 NBA Playoffs action, featuring the best highlights, storylines and more, with our live blog for April 28, 2026.

items.headline: Kevin Durant is ruled out for Game 5 against the Lakers
items.description: Kevin Durant didn’t participate in practice with the Rockets on Tuesday before they left for California.

items.headline: The Athletic: An unlikely underdog has the Magic on the verge of a major upset
items.description: Cain, who had the dunk of the playoffs, played a big role in Orlando pushing Detroit to the brink.

items.headline: Celtics' Brad Stevens named NBA Basketball Executive of the Year
items.description: Brad Stevens wins his second career NBA Executive of Year award after assembling the roster for Boston's 56-win team.

items.headline: The Athletic: How Reed Sheppard earned the Rockets’ trust
items.description: After a tough rookie year, Sheppard turned to the people he trusted most to help him prepare for his second season — his parents.

items.headline: Starting 5: Trio of thrilling games on Monday; Looking ahead to Tuesday's slate
items.description: The Magic, Thunder and Nuggets all get wins on Monday, plus we look ahead to each of the three Game 5s tonight.

items.headline: NBA ID Postseason Challenge
items.description: Complete actions from April 28-May 3 with the NBA ID Postseason Challenge to earn rewards and enter for a chance to win a trip to the NBA Finals.

items.headline: NBA announces fines for Lakers guards Marcus Smart, Luke Kennard
items.description: Lakers Marcus Smart and Luke Kennard have been fined by the NBA for their conduct regarding officials in the wake of Game 4 against the Rockets.

items.headline: Pat Riley isn’t retiring, sets his sights on another Heat title run
items.description: Pat Riley is not retiring, not resigning, not stepping aside as president of the Heat. Instead, he's aiming for another NBA title.

items.headline: Recap: Thunder advance, Magic, Nuggets win
items.description: Enjoy the best of Monday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs with the NBA.com live blog.
